description: OPERATOR-DEFINED policy list. TruthLens does NOT ship political judgments. Add the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes YOUR organization considers adversarial/high-risk for origin flagging (e.g. ["RU", "KP", "IR"]). Left empty by default so nothing is flagged until you set a policy. This list is matched against observed server/ASN/registrant countries and is fully auditable.
